task: Stack blocks (small Lego) one on top of the other every time
raw:
SCENE ANALYSIS - A blue baseplate with a grid pattern is on a blue surface. Multiple small, colorful blocks are scattered on the surface. The blocks are small, cube-shaped, and have distinct colors (red, yellow, green, blue, etc.). STRATEGY - Pick up one block at a time, transport it to the baseplate, and place it down. Repeat for all blocks. Failure modes include dropping a block during transport or placing it incorrectly. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach for a block on the surface; Step 2 grasp the block; Step 3 transport to the baseplate; Step 4 place on the baseplate; Repeat for all blocks.
Goal: all_on(blocks, baseplate)
Scene: blue_baseplate, red_block, yellow_block, green_block, blue_block, purple_block, orange_block, cyan_block, magenta_block
Step 1: reach(red_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the red block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_block) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the red block
  contact: holding(red_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_block)
Step 3: transport(red_block -> blue_baseplate)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue baseplate
  spatial: above(red_block, blue_baseplate, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_block)
  done_when: above(red_block, blue_baseplate, 0.05)
Step 4: place(red_block -> blue_baseplate)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue baseplate
  contact: surface_contact(red_block, blue_baseplate) [completion]; released(red_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(red_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_block, blue_baseplate) AND released(red_block)
Step 5: reach(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, yellow_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, yellow_block) < 0.03
Step 6: grasp(yellow_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the yellow block
  contact: holding(yellow_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(yellow_block)
Step 7: transport(yellow_block -> blue_baseplate)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue baseplate
  spatial: above(yellow_block, blue_baseplate, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(yellow_block)
  done_when: above(yellow_block, blue_baseplate, 0.05)
Step 8: place(yellow_block -> blue_baseplate)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue baseplate
  contact: surface_contact(yellow_block, blue_baseplate) [completion]; released(yellow_block) [completion]
  pose: stable(yellow_block) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(yellow_block, blue_baseplate) AND released(yellow_block)
Step 9: reach(green_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the green block
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, green_block, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, green_block) < 0.03
Step 10: grasp(green_block)
  affordance_region: the body of the green block
  contact: holding(green_block) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(green_block)
Step 11: transport(green_block -> blue_baseplate)
  affordance_region: an empty area on the blue baseplate
  spatial: above(green_block, blue_baseplate, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(green_block)
  done_when: above(green_block, blue_baseplate, 0.05)
Step 12: place(green_block -> blue_baseplate)
